message:
feat(core): add unified AgentProvider enum for cross-project agent identity

Covers 12 known AI coding agent CLIs (Claude, Cline, Codex, Cursor,
Devin, Factory, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, Grok, OpenCode, Aider,
Windsurf) with Unknown(String) for forward compat.  Provides
from_process_name, from_binary_name, from_slug, display_name,
canonical_slug, and AgentType conversion bridges.  55 unit tests.

Closes ft-27pjj.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
